summary: Hero Banner Image Upload feature testing completed. All 7 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend upload functionality verified - upload button, copy URL button, and image dropzone all working correctly with R2 storage integration.

evidence: Accepts PNG, JPEG, WebP image formats
Button present in Edit Slide panel
Updates slide image URL after upload
Button present when image URL exists
Copies URL to clipboard on click
Shows 'Image URL copied!' toast on success
Shows image preview when URL exists
Shows upload icon when no image
Image URL input field accepts manual URL entry
Updates slide image when URL is pasted

critical_code_review_comments: Backend /api/upload-image endpoint correctly validates file types (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP)
Backend correctly uploads to R2 storage with fallback to local storage
Frontend correctly handles upload state with loading indicator
Copy URL button shows check icon feedback after copying
seed_data_creation: Test images uploaded to R2 storage during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hero image upload feature fully functional. Admin can upload images via: 1) Click upload button (data-testid='hero-upload-btn'), 2) Click image dropzone area (data-testid='hero-image-dropzone'), 3) Paste URL manually in input field. Images are uploaded to R2 storage (images.tilestation.co.uk). Copy URL button (data-testid='hero-copy-url-btn') copies the image URL to clipboard. Navigate: /admin -> Website -> Homepage Manager -> Click on a slide card to open Edit Slide panel.
